select_when: Several forces are interacting so the outcome is larger or stranger than any single driver would predict alone.
The team needs to explain lollapalooza upside or downside by tracing aligned incentives, pressures, and system interactions.
A single-cause story feels too weak because multiple factors are compounding each other.
A recommendation should identify which combination of forces matters, not just which isolated variable matters most.
avoid_when: The situation is being forced into a dramatic synergy story before the interacting mechanisms have been identified clearly.
One dominant driver already explains the outcome and adding more factors would mostly create narrative fog.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model focused on aligned interacting forces and disproportionate outcomes rather than on generic complexity language.
donor_drops: Did not widen Wave 4 or import donor-shaped higher-order semantics in this coverage batch.
Kept the routing surface conservative so Layer 2B stays canonical and Waves 2 to 4 stay preview-only.
open_questions: Wave 4 candidacy stays observational only for this batch.

select_when.note: Select conditions stay close to the source activation language and are compressed only enough for routing use.

avoid_when.note: Avoid conditions preserve the source anti-patterns and misuse warnings with conservative normalization.

input_type.note: The typed input label is a reviewed routing compression of the source context.

output_type.note: The typed output label compresses the intervention shape implied by the raw source.

reasoning_types.note: Reasoning taxonomy labels are normalized onto the existing Layer 2B vocabulary.
